contentPattern.structure: large horizontal card: image (with Featured badge) + category label + heading + description + date/read-time meta + read-more link; whole card is a link

suitableFor: single featured/hero article card at the top of a blog or journal index
large horizontal promo card with image on one side and text (category, heading, meta, link) on the other
spotlight card with a badge overlay
notSuitableFor: product cards with price and add-to-cart (use cards-product)
text-only testimonial or feature card grids
